segments.text: PART 2
It's great to see so many members of the Twinning Association here tonight.
segments.translation: 很高兴今晚在这里看到这么多结对协会的成员。

segments.text: Since the twinning link between our two towns, Stanthorpe here in England and Malatte in France, was established, the relationship between the towns has gone from strength to strength.
segments.translation: 自从英国的斯坦索普镇和法国的马拉特镇结为友好城市以来，两镇之间的关系日益密切。

segments.text: Last month, 25 members of the association from Stanthorpe spent a weekend in Malatte.
segments.translation: 上个月，来自斯坦索普的 25 名协会成员在马拉特度过了一个周末。

segments.text: Our hosts had arranged a great programme.
segments.translation: 东道主为我们安排了精彩的节目。

segments.text: We learned how cheese is produced in the region and had the chance to taste the products.
segments.translation: 我们了解了该地区奶酪的生产过程，并有机会品尝了奶酪产品。

segments.text: The theme park trip had to be cancelled, but we all had a great time on the final boat trip down the river - that was the real highlight.
segments.translation: 主题公园之旅不得不取消，但我们都在最后的乘船游河之旅中度过了美好时光--这才是真正的亮点。

segments.text: This is a special year for the Association because it's 25 years since we were founded.
segments.translation: 今年是协会成立25周年的特殊年份。

segments.text: In Malatte, they're planning to mark this by building a footbridge in the municipal park.
segments.translation: 在马拉特，他们计划在市政公园修建一座天桥来纪念这个日子。

segments.text: We've been discussing what to do here and we've decided to plant a poplar tree in the museum gardens.
segments.translation: 我们一直在讨论该在这里做些什么，最后决定在博物馆花园里种植一棵白杨树。

segments.text: We considered buying a garden seat to put there, but the authorities weren't happy with that idea.
segments.translation: 我们曾考虑买一个花园座椅放在那里，但当局对这一想法并不满意。

segments.text: In terms of fundraising to support our activities, we've done very well. Our pancake evening was well attended and made record profits.
segments.translation: 在筹款支持我们的活动方面，我们做得很好。我们的煎饼之夜出席人数很多，利润也创了记录。

segments.text: And everyone enjoyed the demonstration of French cookery, which was nearly as successful.
segments.translation: 大家都很喜欢法式烹饪的展示，同样也很成功。

segments.text: Numbers for our film show were limited because of the venue so we're looking for somewhere bigger next year.
segments.translation: 由于场地的原因，我们的电影放映人数有限，所以我们明年要找一个更大的地方。

segments.text: We're looking forward to welcoming our French visitors here next week, and I know that many of you here will be hosting individuals or families.
segments.translation: 我们期待着下周在这里迎接我们的法国客人，我知道在座的许多人都将接待个人或家庭。

segments.text: The coach from France will arrive at 5 pm on Friday. Don't try to do too much that first evening as they'll be tired, so have dinner in the house or garden rather than eating out.
segments.translation: 周五下午 5 点，来自法国的旅游巴士将抵达。第一天晚上不要做太多事情，因为他们会很累，所以晚餐可以在家里或花园里吃，不要在外面吃。

segments.text: The weather looks as if it'll be OK so you might like to plan a barbecue.
segments.translation: 天气看起来会很不错，所以你们可以计划一次烧烤。

segments.text: Then the next morning's market day in town, and that's always a good place to stroll round.
segments.translation: 第二天早晨，镇上有集市，那会是一个闲逛的好地方。

segments.text: On Saturday evening, we'll all meet up at the football club, where once again we'll have Toby Sharp and his band performing English and Scottish country songs.
segments.translation: 周六晚上，我们将在足球俱乐部集合，托比-夏普（Toby Sharp）和他的乐队将再次为我们演唱英格兰和苏格兰乡村歌曲。

segments.text: Toby will already be well known to many of you as last year he organised our special quiz night and presented the prizes.
segments.translation: 你们很多人都知道Toby，因为去年他组织了一场特别的智力竞赛之夜并颁发了奖品。

segments.text: Now on Sunday, we'll be taking our visitors to Farley House. You may not all be familiar with it, so here's a map to help you.
segments.translation: 周日，我们将带客人去法利故居。有人可能不太熟悉这里，所以这里有一张地图可以帮助大家。

segments.text: You can see the car park at the bottom of the map.
segments.translation: 你可以在地图的底部看到停车场。

segments.text: There's an excellent farm shop in the grounds where our visitors can buy local produce - it's in the old stables, which is the first building you come to.
segments.translation: 院子里有一家很不错的农家商店，游客可以在那里买到当地特产——它在老马厩里，这是你来到的第一个建筑。

segments.text: They're built round a courtyard, and the shop's in the far corner on the left. There's also a small café on the right as you go in.
segments.translation: 它们围绕一个庭院而建，商店在最左边的角落里。进门右侧还有一家小咖啡馆。

segments.text: I know that one or two of our visitors may not be all that mobile.
segments.translation: 我知道有一两个访客可能行动不便。

segments.text: The main entrance to the house has a lot of steps so you might want to use the disabled entry. This is on the far side of the house from the car park.
segments.translation: 房屋的正门有很多台阶，因此您可能需要使用残疾人入口。这个入口位于房屋离停车场较远的那一侧。

segments.text: Children will probably be most interested in the adventure playground.
segments.translation: 孩子们可能会对冒险游乐场最感兴趣。

segments.text: That's at the northern end of the larger lake, in a bend on the path that leads to the lake. There's lots for children to do there.
segments.translation: 那是在大湖的北端，在通向湖的小路上的一个拐弯处。那里有很多适合孩子们玩耍的地方。

segments.text: There are a number of lovely gardens near the house.
segments.translation: 房子附近有许多漂亮的花园。

segments.text: The kitchen gardens are rectangular and surrounded by a wall.
segments.translation: 厨房花园呈长方形，四周有围墙环绕。

segments.text: They're to the north-east of the house, quite near the smaller lake. They're still in use and have a great collection of fruit and vegetables.
segments.translation: 它们在房子的东北方向，离小湖很近。它们仍在使用，并收集了大量水果和蔬菜。

segments.text: The Temple of the Four Winds is a bit more of a walk - but it's worth it.
segments.translation: 去四风寺需要走一段路，但值得一去。

segments.text: Take the path from the car park and go past the western sides of the stables and the house.
segments.translation: 从停车场沿着小路走，经过马厩和房屋的西侧。

segments.text: Then when the path forks, take the right-hand path. Go up there with the woods on your left and the temple is right at the end.
segments.translation: 然后在岔路口向右拐，继续往前走，左边是树林，寺庙就在右边的尽头。

segments.text: There are great views over the whole area.
segments.translation: 从这里可以俯瞰整片区域的美丽景色。

segments.text: OK, so that's…
segments.translation: 好的，那么…
